Algorithm.code: 1. Assert: The current execution context will not subsequently be used for the evaluation of any ECMAScript code or built-in functions. The invocation of Call subsequent to the invocation of this abstract operation will create and push a new execution context before performing any such evaluation. 1. Discard all resources associated with the current execution context. 1. Return ~unused~.

AbstractOperationHead.name: PrepareForTailCall
AbstractOperationHead.virtualPackage: 15 ECMAScript Language: Functions and Classes.10 Tail Position Calls.3 PrepareForTailCall ( )

YetExpression.str: The current execution context will not subsequently be used for the evaluation of any ECMAScript code or built-in functions. The invocation of Call subsequent to the invocation of this abstract operation will create and push a new execution context before performing any such evaluation
Discard all resources associated with the current execution context.
